chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1777 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on application for urgent hearing 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on application for exemption 4. For hearing of main case 16.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Pathan, advocate for the petitioner *** 1. Granted. 2to4. Through this petition, petitioner seeks direction against the revenue officers for supply of certified copies of Record of Rights in respect of City Survey No.4851 and 4851/1, Taluka and District Hyderabad. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh, present in Court in some other matters, waives the notice and submits that vide Notification bearing No.DD(E&I)/HQ/BOR/2024/302 dated 21.10.2024 a Public Grievance Redressal Cell under the supervision of Deputy Commissioner of the District concerned has been notified for deciding/dealing with the issues like in hand in accordance with law, therefore, directions may be issued to Deputy Commissioner concerned for deciding the matter in accordance with law. When confronted with the above position, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner will file proper application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to file application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell for redressal of his grievance, if any, within one week from today. In case petitioner files such application, the Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad, being head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell pursuant to aforesaid Notification, is then directed to decide the said application within a period of two months from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity to all concerned.

In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to file application before the Public Grievance Redressal Cell for redressal of his grievance, if any, within one week from today. In case petitioner files such application, the Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad, being head of the Public Grievances Redressal Cell pursuant to aforesaid Notification, is then directed to decide the said application within a period of two months from today strictly in accordance with law after providing ample opportunity to all concerned. Let a copy of this Order be communicated to the office of learned Additional A.G Sindh and Deputy Commissioner Hyderabad for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
